title: CNMTCCO Silicone Air Fryer Liners, 2Pcs Reusable Air Fryer Silicone Liners for Ninja Foodi Air Fryer AF300UK, AF400UK, Airfryer Liners Airfryer Accessories for Ninja Dual Air Fryer, 7.6L-9.5L
features: 【Food-Grade Silicone Material】- Silicone air fryer liners made from premium, food-grade silicone, these liners are non-stick, non-toxic, and BPA-free, ensuring safe cooking at temperatures up to 428°F/220℃. They are a durable, heat-resistant alternative to parchment paper, perfect for achieving consistent and delicious results every time.

【Specially Designed】- Air fryer silicone liners designed with convenient handles on both sides to protect your hands from burns and make handling easy. The raised bottom lines and grooves optimize air circulation and heat distribution, ensuring even cooking and better flavor while draining excess oil for healthier meals.

【Widely Used】- These 2-pack air fryer accessories are perfect for dual air fryers like Ninja AF300UK, AF400UK, Salter, and more. They are ideal for reheating, broiling, roasting, baking, and dehydrating. These liners are versatile enough to use in the oven, microwave, steamer, freezer, and dishwasher, making them indispensable kitchen accessories.

【Easy to Clean】- The flexible silicone material makes cleaning a breeze. Air fryer trays silicone simply wash off food residue and grease with warm water or flip them inside out for a thorough clean. These liners not only keep your air fryer spotless but also extend its lifespan, ensuring it stays in top condition.

【Eco-friendly】- Say goodbye to wasteful parchment paper with these reusable, eco-friendly silicone liners. They save you money and help the environment with just one purchase lasting for countless uses. Economical and sustainable, airfryer silicone liners are a smart choice for any eco-conscious kitchen.
description: Product Description Easy to Clean You can clean the silicone liners of your air fryer very easily by turning them inside out and hand washing them with warm soapy water and a brush. Handle for Easy Lifting. The carrying handles on both sides are designed to prevent food burns when picking it up, and we recommend that you wear gloves when removing it. Food grade silicone material The air fryer silicone liner has good stretchability, so it will change back to its original shape no matter how much it is kneaded.
